title: SolarTimesResponse
description: Response from the Sunrise Sunset API containing solar event times for a given location and date.

tzid.description: IANA timezone identifier used in the response. Present when tzid parameter was supplied or formatted=0.

SolarTimes.title: SolarTimes
SolarTimes.description: Solar event times for the requested location and date.

sunrise.description: Time of sunrise. String in 12-hour format when formatted=1, ISO 8601 when formatted=0.

sunset.description: Time of sunset. String in 12-hour format when formatted=1, ISO 8601 when formatted=0.

day_length.description: Length of day. HH:MM:SS string when formatted=1; total seconds as integer when formatted=0.

civil_twilight_begin.description: Start of civil twilight (sun 6 degrees below horizon).

civil_twilight_end.description: End of civil twilight (sun 6 degrees below horizon).

nautical_twilight_begin.description: Start of nautical twilight (sun 12 degrees below horizon).

nautical_twilight_end.description: End of nautical twilight (sun 12 degrees below horizon).

astronomical_twilight_begin.description: Start of astronomical twilight (sun 18 degrees below horizon).

astronomical_twilight_end.description: End of astronomical twilight (sun 18 degrees below horizon).
